adv_addresses: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.patient_id) FROM sqlonfhir.patient_demographics p WHERE p.birth_date::date <= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '70 years'
adv_dob_list: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT patient_id) FROM sqlonfhir.patient_demographics WHERE birth_date IS NOT NULL
adv_min_name: SELECT MIN(p.family_name) FROM sqlonfhir.patient_demographics p JOIN sqlonfhir.condition_simple c ON c.patient_id = p.patient_id WHERE (c.code_text ILIKE '%hypertension%' OR c.icd10_display ILIKE '%hypertension%' OR c.snomed_display ILIKE '%hypertension%')
adv_names: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.patient_id) FROM sqlonfhir.patient_demographics p JOIN sqlonfhir.condition_simple c ON c.patient_id = p.patient_id WHERE (c.code_text ILIKE '%diabetes%' OR c.icd10_display ILIKE '%diabetes%' OR c.snomed_display ILIKE '%diabetes%')
age_over_18: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.patient_id) FROM sqlonfhir.patient_demographics p WHERE p.birth_date::date <= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '18 years'
age_under_65: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.patient_id) FROM sqlonfhir.patient_demographics p WHERE p.birth_date::date > CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '65 years'
cond_diabetes: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.patient_id) FROM sqlonfhir.condition_simple c WHERE (c.code_text ILIKE '%diabetes%' OR c.icd10_display ILIKE '%diabetes%' OR c.snomed_display ILIKE '%diabetes%')
cond_hypertension: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.patient_id) FROM sqlonfhir.condition_simple c WHERE (c.code_text ILIKE '%hypertension%' OR c.icd10_display ILIKE '%hypertension%' OR c.snomed_display ILIKE '%hypertension%')
count_distinct_condition_texts: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT code_text) FROM sqlonfhir.condition_simple WHERE code_text IS NOT NULL
diabetes_and_hypertension: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.patient_id) FROM sqlonfhir.patient_demographics p JOIN sqlonfhir.condition_simple c1 ON c1.patient_id = p.patient_id JOIN sqlonfhir.condition_simple c2 ON c2.patient_id = p.patient_id WHERE (c1.code_text ILIKE '%diabetes%' OR c1.icd10_display ILIKE '%diabetes%' OR c1.snomed_display ILIKE '%diabetes%') AND (c2.code_text ILIKE '%hypertension%' OR c2.icd10_display ILIKE '%hypertension%' OR c2.snomed_display ILIKE '%hypertension%')
female_hypertension_under_65: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.patient_id) FROM sqlonfhir.patient_demographics p JOIN sqlonfhir.condition_simple c ON c.patient_id = p.patient_id WHERE p.gender = 'female' AND p.birth_date::date > CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '65 years' AND (c.code_text ILIKE '%hypertension%' OR c.icd10_display ILIKE '%hypertension%' OR c.snomed_display ILIKE '%hypertension%')
female_under_65: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.patient_id) FROM sqlonfhir.patient_demographics p WHERE p.gender = 'female' AND p.birth_date::date > CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '65 years'
female_with_medication: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT m.patient_id) FROM sqlonfhir.medication_requests m JOIN sqlonfhir.patient_demographics p ON p.patient_id = m.patient_id WHERE p.gender = 'female'
gender_female: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.patient_id) FROM sqlonfhir.patient_demographics p WHERE p.gender = 'female'
gender_male: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.patient_id) FROM sqlonfhir.patient_demographics p WHERE p.gender = 'male'
lab_glucose: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT o.patient_id) FROM sqlonfhir.observation_labs o WHERE o.code_display ILIKE '%glucose%'
lab_glucose_high: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ol.patient_id) FROM sqlonfhir.observation_labs ol WHERE ol.code_display ILIKE '%glucose%' AND ol.value_quantity::numeric > 125 AND ol.value_unit ILIKE '%mg/dL%'
male_over_18_diabetes: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.patient_id) FROM sqlonfhir.patient_demographics p JOIN sqlonfhir.condition_simple c ON c.patient_id = p.patient_id WHERE p.gender = 'male' AND p.birth_date::date <= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '18 years' AND (c.code_text ILIKE '%diabetes%' OR c.icd10_display ILIKE '%diabetes%' OR c.snomed_display ILIKE '%diabetes%')
negation_no_meds: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.patient_id) FROM sqlonfhir.patient_demographics p WHERE p.patient_id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT m.patient_id FROM sqlonfhir.medication_requests m WHERE m.patient_id IS NOT NULL)
negation_without_diabetes: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.patient_id) FROM sqlonfhir.patient_demographics p WHERE p.patient_id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT c.patient_id FROM sqlonfhir.condition_simple c WHERE c.code_text ILIKE '%diabetes%' OR c.icd10_display ILIKE '%diabetes%' OR c.snomed_display ILIKE '%diabetes%')
temporal_med_since_2021: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT m.patient_id) FROM sqlonfhir.medication_requests m WHERE m.authored_on::date >= '2021-01-01'
temporal_procedure_after_2020: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.patient_id) FROM sqlonfhir.procedure_history p WHERE COALESCE(p.performed_datetime, p.performed_period_start)::date > '2020-01-01'
